tracks.rawText: 4:24Ritual of the Fractal Sunv5.5Hypnotic psytrance ritual with 145 BPM rolling 4-on-the-floor kick, elastic psy bass, and fractal FM synth arpeggios, Mex-inspired percussion: congas, cowbell, shaker, and tribal toms drive the groove, while filtered chants, resonant sweeps, delay throws, and acid lines build a trance-heavy, ceremonial texture1PublishRemix
